item.title: emacsclient on macOS
item.description: Starting Emacs Server Automatically Configure a macOS launch agent with the plist file and load it with launchctl. launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/gnu.emacs.daemon.plist <!-- Put following in ~/Library/LaunchAgents/gnu.emacs.daemon.plist --> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1.0"> <dict> <key>Label</key> <string>gnu.emacs.daemon</string> <key>ProgramArguments</key> <array> <string>/Applications/MacPorts/Emacs.app/Contents/MacOS/Emacs</string> <string>--fg-daemon</string> </array> <key>RunAtLoad</key> <true/> <key>ProcessType</key> <string>Interactive</string> </dict> </plist> Emacs Client with AppleScript Save the following in Script Editor.app as an Application.

item.title: less
item.description: Keys u / d: move backward/forward one half-window. b / f: move backward/forward one window. ESC u: toggle search highlighting. n / N: repeat last search in normal/reverse direction.

item.title: nsswitch.conf
item.description: nsswitch.conf, the Name Service Switch configuration file, is used by glibc and certain other applications. Most notably, it controls the user, group and host lookup processes.

item.title: Unicode
item.description: List of all Emoji characters www.unicode.org/Public/emoji/16.0/emoji-test.txt Names List Charts www.unicode.org/charts/nameslist/ Click on the block name to get to a code ...

item.title: iTerm2 Features
item.description: Search To fix a search highlight bug, go to advanced settings and turn off “Synchronize search queries across windows and applications”. Copy Mode To copy text from iTerm2 with keyboard only, press s-S-c to activate copy mode.

item.title: Ghostty
item.description: My Config # Until search function is implemented. keybind = super+f=write_screen_file:open # For low DPI screens on macOS. font-thicken = true.

item.title: My R environment with Conda
item.description: Installation Follow github.com/conda-forge/miniforge to install Miniforge, and then: mamba create -n r44 r r-tidyverse r-plotly r-arrow r-showtext r-duckdb echo 'r ==4.4' ...

item.title: Name Resolution on Linux
item.description: With glibc, name resolution goes getaddrinfo() → nsswitch.conf (for Name Service Switch, which is not Network Security Services) → /etc/hosts or DNS. If DNS: → libresolv → host.conf → /etc/hosts or real DNS.

item.title: macOS Disk Space Analysis
item.description: Analysis Analyze file tree size: sudo ncdu -x /System/Volumes/Data Monitor file access: sudo fs_usage -w | grep <keyword> Clean up sudo log erase --all # for /var/db/diagnostics ...
